promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next concrete residual paired-family refinement immediately after the prior A2-mid stress-search batch deferred this Bell-seed entangle family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest family-level seams: Bell-seed pair identity, randomized scramble with deterministic stored output, entangling setup with zero stored negativity, tiny positive-space branch discrimination, comparison against the prior search-failure family, and local evidence without repo-top admission.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The adjacent stress-search A2-mid batch provides the zero-negativity comparison packet, the AB A2-mid batch provides a nearby signal-without-negativity caution pattern, and the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the local evidence versus repo-top omission pattern.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred because it is the next residual pair and must stay outside this bounded Bell-seed pass.
Not selected because it would erase the distinction between fixed-contract nonnegativity and prior search failure preserved by the parent batch.
Not selected because the parent family batch already contains the needed bounded seams.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent Bell-seed entangle batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable shell, deterministic-output, zero-negativity, branch-discrimination, comparison, and evidence-status packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: AXIS0_BELLSEED_ENTANGLE_PAIR_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest shell for the Bell-seed entangle residual pair.

candidate_items.name: RANDOMIZED_BELLSCRAMBLE_WITH_DETERMINISTIC_OUTPUT_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest randomized-initialization versus deterministic-output packet.

candidate_items.name: ENTANGLING_SETUP_WITH_ZERO_NEGATIVITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-projection packet between entangling setup and stored zero negativity.

candidate_items.name: POSITIVE_SPACE_BRANCH_DISCRIMINATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clearest branch-difference packet while blocking negativity overread.

candidate_items.name: FIXED_CONTRACT_NONNEGATIVITY_VS_SEARCH_FAILURE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest anti-flattening comparison between the current fixed Bell-seed family and the prior stress-search family.

candidate_items.name: LOCAL_BELLSEED_EVIDENCE_WITHOUT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent batch's main visibility contradiction for the Bell-seed family.

quarantined_items.name: RANDOM_BELL_SCRAMBLE_AS_MEANINGFUL_TRIAL_VARIANCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The runner scrambles locally every trial, but the stored branch ranges remain only at floating-point-noise scale.

quarantined_items.name: BELL_SEED_PLUS_CNOT_AS_NEGATIVITY_PROOF
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Bell seeds plus repeated CNOTs are weaker than proof of stored negative conditional entropy because both branches still remain nonnegative.

quarantined_items.name: TINY_BRANCH_DELTAS_AS_NEGATIVITY_SUCCESS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The tiny branch deltas are weaker than negativity onset because the stored negativity fraction difference remains zero.

quarantined_items.name: ZERO_NEGATIVITY_CONVERGENCE_AS_SAME_FAILURE_MODE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The current family is one fixed contract while the prior family is a broader failed search, so shared zero negativity does not make them the same failure type.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_EVIDENCE_AS_REPOTOP_ADMISSION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog presence and local evidence are both weaker than repo-top evidence admission.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable family-level packets from the Bell-seed entangle batch without reopening raw sims files.

They keep family identity, deterministic stored behavior, zero stored negativity, tiny positive-space branch discrimination, search-vs-fixed comparison, and local-only evidence status distinct instead of collapsing them into one story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain variance-overreads, negativity-overreads, metric-overreads, comparison-overreads, or admission-overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
